_comment: Per-wallet policy configuration. Filename convention: wallet-policy-{walletId}.json
_amounts: All monetary amounts are in minor units (e.g. cents). EUR 50.00 = 5000

spend._comment_maxTransactionAmount: Deny any single spend above €500.00. Null = no cap.
spend._comment_blockedMerchants: Merchants always denied regardless of funds.
spend._comment_overspendFallbackPocketId: PocketId to cover shortfall. Null = deny overspend.
spend._comment_lowBalanceNotifyThreshold: Emit RuleNotificationRaised when balance after spend < €10.00

transfer._comment_maxTransferAmount: Deny any single transfer above €1000.00. Null = no cap.
transfer._comment_enforceBenefitCompatibility: Deny transfer between pockets with incompatible benefit categories.
